curation_notes: Re-curation of GHSA-jpgg-cp2x-qrw3 (duplicate of GHSA-5gjg-jgh4-gppm / CVE-2021-4236). The advisory describes WebSocket requests not executing AuthenticateMethod, leading to nil pointer dereference or authentication bypass. The patch commit 5a78f8d modifies only websocket.go, adding AuthenticateMethod invocation and nil-check logic in the socketHandler function. Kept pre-assigned vuln_class null-deref as CWE-476 is explicitly listed and the nil pointer dereference is the primary crash vector. Updated L1 hint for broader coverage, and L3 hints now properly narrow to WebSocket-specific subsystem distinct from L1/L2. No sibling files share the vulnerability — http.go and api.go both properly call AuthenticateMethod.
